Feature.Name: DeviceControl
Feature.Description::cn: 查看设备信息，修改设备名称以及重启设备

Feature.Name: IDADeviceFirmwareVersion
Feature.Description::en: IDA Version of the firmware in the device.
Feature.Description::cn: 底座设备固件版本信息，包括固件版本、日期

Feature.Name: DeviceAlgorithmLibraryVersion
Feature.Description::cn: 设备算法版本信息，包括算法版本和日期

Feature.Name: DeviceFirmwareVersion
Feature.Description::en: Version of the firmware in the device.
Feature.Description::cn: 设备固件版本信息，包括固件版本、日期、FPGA(L3)版本

Feature.Name: MultiFrameIndex
Feature.Description::en: The frame index need to be OCR processing in specified mode.
Feature.Description::cn: 指定一帧图像进行OCR识别

Feature.Name: DeviceSerialNumber
Feature.Description::en: Device`s serial number. This string is a unique identifier of the device.
Feature.Description::cn: 设备序列号，此序列号可唯一标识设备

Feature.Name: DeviceUserID
Feature.Description::cn: 用户可自定义设备名称

Feature.Name: IDHDeviceVendorName
Feature.Description::en: IDH Manufacturer information about the device.

Feature.Name: IDHDeviceModelName
Feature.Description::en: IDH Model name of the device.

Feature.Name: IDHDeviceFirmwareVersion
Feature.Description::en: IDH Version of the firmware in the device.
Feature.Description::cn: 巴枪设备固件版本信息，包括固件版本、日期

Feature.Name: IDHDeviceSerialNumber
Feature.Description::en: IDH Device`s serial number. This string is a unique identifier of the device.
Feature.Description::cn: 巴枪设备序列号，此序列号可唯一标识设备

Feature.Name: IDADeviceVendorName
Feature.Description::en: IDA Manufacturer information about the device.

Feature.Name: IDADeviceModelName
Feature.Description::en: IDA Model name of the device.

Feature.Name: IDADeviceSerialNumber
Feature.Description::en: IDA Device`s serial number. This string is a unique identifier of the device.
Feature.Description::cn: 底座设备序列号，此序列号可唯一标识设备

Feature.Name: CameraType
Feature.Description::cn: 设备类型信息，不对用户开放，仅供工具端和相机内部获取

Feature.Name: DeviceReset
Feature.Description::en: Resets the device to its initial state and default settings.
Feature.Description::cn: 重启设备，将设备重置为其初始状态和默认设置

Feature.Name: UsbDriverParamMode
Feature.Description::cn: 默认为自动分配模式，使能时为序列号唯一匹配模式

Feature.Name: PrivateDiscoveryProtocol
Feature.Description::cn: 启用该协议，则需要通过私有协议进行枚举相机,此时标准协议不可枚举及占用

Feature.Name: PreventingIllegalOccupation
Feature.Description::cn: 防止相机被非法占用, 如果开启防止占用功能，会进行设备与IDMVS客户端的密钥校验

Feature.Name: RawModeEnable
Feature.Description::cn: 启用该模式，显示图像为原图

Feature.Name: AlgorithmParamsControl
Feature.Description::cn: 查看并设置读码算法相关参数，例如最大条码识别个数、等待时间等

Feature.Name: ScreenControl
Feature.Description::cn: 查看并设置屏幕相关参数，例如屏幕开关、亮度、语言等

Feature.Name: BillParamControl
Feature.Description::cn: 查看并设置面单目标定位算法相关参数

Feature.Name: OCRParamControl
Feature.Description::en: char detect and recognition algorithm param.
Feature.Description::cn: 查看并设置字符定位识别算法相关参数

Feature.Name: AutoWorkReal
Feature.Description::cn: 相机重启后处于自动工作状态，无需连接客户端即可出图

Feature.Name: RTC
Feature.Description::en: Use the Real Time Clock to correct the time of camera.
Feature.Description::cn: 使用NTP实时时钟校正设备时间

Feature.Name: RTCInterval
Feature.Description::en: Set time of camera at the interval.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置NTP时间间隔，每隔一定时间进行设备校时(Hour)

Feature.Name: ExtCmdControl
Feature.Description::cn: 通过外部命令控制设备

Feature.Name: ExtCmdProtocols
Feature.Description::cn: 通讯命令协议选择，支持TCP、UDP和串口

Feature.Name: ExtCmdTcpPort
Feature.Description::en: External command Tcp Port, can't equal to tcp trigger port.
Feature.Description::cn: 控制通讯命令TCP的端口号

Feature.Name: ExtCmdUdpPort
Feature.Description::en: External command Udp Port, can't equal to udp trigger port.
Feature.Description::cn: 控制通讯命令UDP的端口号

Feature.Name: ExtCmdSerialEnable
Feature.Description::cn: 控制通讯命令串口使能

Feature.Name: ExtCmdUsbEnable
Feature.Description::en: External command Usb Serial enable control.
Feature.Description::cn: 控制通讯命令USB转串口使能

Features.Description::en: Category for device information and control.
Features.Description::cn: 查看设备信息，修改设备名称以及重启设备

Feature.Name: ReadSetting
Feature.Description::en: Set the operation mode and the type of barcode reading.
Feature.Description::cn: 查看并设置运行模式以及读取条码的类型

Feature.Name: RunningMode
Feature.Description::en: The data mode send to the host

Feature.Name: GS1
Feature.Description::en: GS1 format output enable, including GS1-128, GS1-DM, GS1-QR
Feature.Description::cn: GS1格式输出使能，包含 GS1-128, GS1-DM, GS1-QR

Features.Description::en: Set the operation mode and the type of barcode reading.
Features.Description::cn: 查看并设置运行模式以及读取条码的类型

Feature.Name: ImageSetting
Feature.Description::cn: 查看并设置帧率、曝光、增益、Gamma 等

Feature.Name: AcquisitionFrameRate
Feature.Description::en: Controls the acquisition rate at which the frames are captured.
Feature.Description::cn: 控制捕获帧时的采集速率

Feature.Name: CameraSelector
Feature.Description::en: select different camera to set img param, equal to CameraSelector in AlgoSetting

Feature.Name: ResultingFrameRate
Feature.Description::en: Indicates the 'absolute' value of the maximum allowed acquisition frame rate. The 'absolute' value is a float value that indicates the maximum allowed acquisition frame rate in frames per second given the current settings for the area of interest, exposure time, and bandwidth.
Feature.Description::cn: 指示允许的最大采集帧速率的“绝对”值。“绝对”值是一个浮点值，表示给定感兴趣区域、曝光时间和带宽的当前设置，允许的最大采集帧速率（以每秒帧数为单位）

Feature.Name: AcquisitionBurstFrameCount
Feature.Description::en: Number of frames to acquire for each FrameBurstStart trigger.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置每一次触发发生时的帧数

Feature.Name: FullViewAcquisitionMode
Feature.Description::en: select different camera to set img param, equal to CameraSelector in AlgoSetting

Feature.Name: FullViewStartAcquisitionDelayFrameCount
Feature.DisplayName::en: FullView Start Acquisition Delay Frame Count
Feature.Description::en: Number of frames to acquire for each FrameBurstStart trigger.

Feature.Name: FullViewAcquisitionBurstFrameCount
Feature.Description::en: Number of frames to acquire for each FrameBurstStart trigger.

Feature.Name: ExposureTime
Feature.Description::en: Exposure time in us when Exposure Mode is Timed.
Feature.Description::cn: 指定曝光模式下的曝光时间(us)

Feature.Name: Gain
Feature.Description::en: Gain applied to the image in dB.

Feature.Name: PreampGain
Feature.Description::cn: 应用于图像的等级增益

Feature.Name: Gamma
Feature.Description::en: Controls the gamma correction of pixel intensity.

Feature.Name: WidthMax
Feature.Description::en: Maximum width of the image (in pixels).

Feature.Name: HeightMax
Feature.Description::en: Maximum height of the image (in pixels).

Feature.Name: ExposureAuto
Feature.Description::en: Sets the automatic exposure mode when Exposure Mode is Timed.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置自动曝光模式，自动调整相机曝光时间

Feature.Name: ExposingArea
Feature.Description::en: Sets the area of exposure, global or partial
Feature.Description::cn: 设置曝光区域，全局曝光或者局部曝光

Feature.Name: AreaWidth
Feature.Description::en: Width of the area which will be uesed to calculate the average brightness (in pixels).
Feature.Description::cn: 用于计算平均亮度的区域宽度

Feature.Name: AreaHeight
Feature.Description::en: Height of the area which will be uesed to calculate the average brightness (in pixels).
Feature.Description::cn: 用于计算平均亮度的区域高度(px)

Feature.Name: AreaOffsetX
Feature.Description::en: Vertical offset from the origin of the area (in pixels).
Feature.Description::cn: 距离区域原点的X轴垂直偏移(px)

Feature.Name: AreaOffsetY
Feature.Description::en: Horizontal offset from the origin of the area (in pixels).
Feature.Description::cn: 距离区域原点的Y轴垂直偏移(px)

Feature.Name: GainAuto
Feature.Description::en: Sets the automatic gain control (AGC) mode.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置自动增益控制模式

Feature.Name: ExposureAlternate
Feature.Description::cn: 选择开启或关闭交替曝光功能

Feature.Name: AlternateExposureEnable
Feature.Description::en: Enable specific group of exposure or not.
Feature.Description::cn: 是否使用特定的曝光组

Feature.Name: AlternateExposureTime
Feature.Description::en: The exposure value of specific group.
Feature.Description::cn: 特定曝光组的曝光时间

Feature.Name: GainAlternate
Feature.Description::cn: 选择开启或关闭交替增益功能

Feature.Name: AlternateGainEnable
Feature.Description::en: Enable specific group of gain or not.
Feature.Description::cn: 是否使用特定的增益组

Feature.Name: AlternateGain
Feature.Description::en: The gain value of specific group.

Feature.Name: ReverseX
Feature.Description::en: [ReverseX] Flip horizontally the image sent by the device. The AOI is applied after the flip.
Feature.Description::cn: 将设备传送出的图像进行水平方向翻转

Feature.Name: ReverseY
Feature.Description::en: [ReverseY] Flip vertically the image sent by the device. The AOI is applied after the flip.
Feature.Description::cn: 将设备传送出的图像进行竖直方向翻转

Feature.Name: Brightness
Feature.Description::en: This value sets the selected Brightness control

Feature.Name: UploadTestRawPictureEnable
Feature.Description::en: Open FTP Server To Upload Raw Test Picture
Feature.Description::cn: 上传测试图FTP服务器使能

Feature.Name: TestPattern
Feature.Description::en: Selects the type of test pattern that is generated by the device as image source.
Feature.Description::cn: 选择设备内部的测试图像作为图像源

Feature.Name: TestImageType
Feature.Description::en: Select the type of test image.
Feature.Description::cn: 选择设备内部的测试图像类型作为图像源

Feature.Name: AcquisitionFrameRateAdaptEnable
Feature.Description::en: Enable frame rate adaptation or not.
Feature.Description::cn: 用户选择是否启用帧率自适应功能

Feature.Name: WholeImageOutput
Feature.Description::en: Enable Whole Image Output or not

Feature.Name: LightBrightness
Feature.Description::en: Set the brightness of the fill light.

Feature.Name: PollingEnable
Feature.Description::cn: 用户可选择关闭轮询，开启单组轮询，开启多组轮询

Feature.Name: PrivatePollingBestGroupNum
Feature.Description::en: the private best polling group num after polling.
Feature.Description::cn: 轮询后的私有最优轮询索引号

Feature.Name: PollingState
Feature.Description::en: the flag indicates the status of polling 0-Polling End, 1-Polling Run.
Feature.Description::cn: 轮询状态标志位表示当前轮询的状态，0表示轮询结束，1表示轮询正在进行

Feature.Name: PollingVertline
Feature.Description::en: vert value of each polling group.
Feature.Description::cn: 每一组轮询参数对应的vert值，不对用户开放，仅程序内部使用

Feature.Name: PollingPeriod
Feature.Description::en: Polling stops at the end of the set period.
Feature.Description::cn: 轮询周期数，所有使能的轮询组各触发一次是一个轮询周期

Feature.Name: PollingStopCodeNum
Feature.Description::cn: 设置轮询停止的条码数

Feature.Name: PollingBestGroupNum
Feature.Description::en: the best polling group num after polling.
Feature.Description::cn: 轮询结束后自动更新当前环境参数最优的轮询组索引号

Feature.Name: PollingParamEnable
Feature.Description::en: Control the current group participate the polling process.
Feature.Description::cn: 使能该轮询组后，可以配置该轮询组的各项参数

Feature.Name: PollingExposureTime
Feature.Description::cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的轮询曝光时间

Feature.Name: PollingGain
Feature.Description::cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的轮询增益

Feature.Name: PollingGamma
Feature.Description::cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的轮询Gamma

Feature.Name: PollingLightSelector
Feature.Description::cn: 选择每个轮询组对应的各路补光灯

Feature.Name: PollingLightEnable
Feature.Description::cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的轮询补光灯某一路是否使能

Feature.Name: PollingParamChgTime
Feature.DisplayName::en: last time of User-set for Polling Param.
Feature.Description::cn: 上一次修改轮询参数时间

Feature.Name: PollCodeTypeSelector
Feature.DisplayName::en: Selects Algo Type to set codeLen for each of them.
Feature.Description::cn: 选择算法码制设置码的长度

Feature.Name: PollCodeLenMax
Feature.Description::en: The maximum barcode length that can be obtained through polling.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置轮询码制最大长度

Feature.Name: PollCodeLenMin
Feature.Description::en: The Minimum barcode length that can be obtained through polling.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置轮询码制最小长度

Feature.Name: PollingIOSelector
Feature.Description::en: Selects the physical line (or pin) of the external device connector to configure(Polling).
Feature.Description::cn: 选择要配置（轮询）的外部设备的连接线路（或引脚）。

Feature.Name: PollingIOAction
Feature.Description::en: Selects which internal acquisition or I/O source signal to output on the selected line.
Feature.Description::cn: 选择线路上输出内部采集信号

Features.Description::cn: 查看并设置帧率、曝光、增益、Gamma 等

Feature.Name: ArithmeticControl
Feature.Description::cn: 查看并设置读码算法相关参数，例如最大条码识别个数、等待时间等

Feature.Name: AlgoAdvanceParam1
Feature.Description::en: Enable the decoding mode of the algorithm param1.
Feature.Description::cn: 配置高级参数1增强特殊码识别精度

Feature.Name: AlgoAdvanceParam2
Feature.Description::en: Enable the decoding mode of the algorithm param2.
Feature.Description::cn: 配置高级参数2增强特殊码识别精度

Feature.Name: AlgoAdvanceParam1
Feature.Description::en: Enable the decoding mode of the algorithm param1.
Feature.Description::cn: 配置高级参数1增强特殊码识别精度

Feature.Name: AlgoAdvanceParam2
Feature.Description::en: Enable the decoding mode of the algorithm param2.
Feature.Description::cn: 配置高级参数2增强特殊码识别精度

Feature.Name: LocBarNum
Feature.Description::en: Numbers of the barcode region in positioning module.

Feature.Name: IdxLocCodeNum
Feature.Description::en: Numbers of the two barcode region in positioning module.

Feature.Name: PositionXROI
Feature.Description::cn: 距离区域原点的X轴垂直偏移(px)

Feature.Name: PositionYROI
Feature.Description::cn: 距离区域原点的y轴垂直偏移(px)

Feature.Name: IdxMaxBarSize
Feature.Description::en: The maximum width of the code for code positioning module.

Feature.Name: Quality1DMaxNum
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 一维码打码评级最大个数
Feature.Description::cn: 一维码打码评级最大个数

Feature.Name: StackBarNum
Feature.Description::en: Numbers of the stack code region in positioning module.

Feature.Name: WaitingTime
Feature.Description::en: Maximum times to wait until recognize timeout.

Feature.Name: AccurateTimeoutEnable
Feature.Description::en: Code algorithm accurate timeout control available or not.
Feature.Description::cn: 读码精准等待时间配置

Feature.Name: AlgoDebugInfoEnable
Feature.Description::en: Enable algorithm debugging to print information to images. Attention: Enabling may affect performance.
Feature.Description::cn: 算法调试信息打印至图像文件. 注意:使能后可能会影响算法性能.

Feature.Name: AlgoCameraSelector
Feature.Description::en: select different camera to set algo param, equal to CameraSelector in ImgSetting

Feature.Name: DisplayOutputChannelSelector
Feature.Description::en: select different Channel to set sdk output param

Feature.Name: QualityEnable
Feature.Description::en: Code Quality is available or not.

Feature.Name: RatingStandard1D_Enable
Feature.Description::en: set 1D Rating Standard Enable or not.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 一维码总评级过滤开关
Feature.Description::cn: 一维码总评级过滤开关

Feature.Name: RatingStandard1D
Feature.Description::en: set 1D Rating Standard is available or not.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 一维码总评级过滤条件
Feature.Description::cn: 一维码总评级过滤条件

Feature.Name: RatingStandard2D_Enable
Feature.Description::en: set 2D Rating Standard Enable or not.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 二维码总评级过滤开关

Feature.Name: RatingStandard2D
Feature.Description::en: set 2D Rating Standard is available or not.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 二维码总评级过滤条件
Feature.Description::cn: 二维码总评级过滤条件

Feature.Name: Quality2DMaxNum
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 二维码打码评级最大个数
Feature.Description::cn: 二维码打码评级最大个数

Feature.Name: SymProcType
Feature.Description::en: Algorithm library code rating processing type.

Feature.Name: VerifyEdition
Feature.Description::cn: 质量验证模块标志选择

Feature.Name: EdgeFeature
Feature.Description::en: indicate code L side is discrete or continuous

Feature.Name: Quality1DEnable
Feature.Description::en: Code Quality is available or not.

Feature.Name: RatingStandard1D_Enable
Feature.Description::en: set 1D Rating Standard Enable or not.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 一维码总评级过滤开关
Feature.Description::cn: 一维码总评级过滤开关

Feature.Name: RatingStandard1D
Feature.Description::en: set 1D Rating Standard is available or not.

Feature.Name: Quality1DMaxNum
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 一维码打码评级最大个数

Feature.Description::cn: 最小边缘对比度A等级配置

Feature.Description::en: Select the Section you want to enable.

Feature.Description::cn: ToF测量范围。如果物体距离大于设定值将不对焦。(mm)

Feature.Description::cn: 可对设备的调焦和自适应进程控制

Feature.Name: SmartTune
Feature.Description::cn: 点击按钮开始智能调参

Feature.Name: StopTune
Feature.Description::cn: 停止自动对焦和自适应

Feature.Name: FocusOptSelect
Feature.Description::cn: 可调整设备的聚焦参数

Feature.Name: SamOptSelect
Feature.Description::cn: 可调整设备的自适应参数

Feature.Name: FocusStart
Feature.Description::cn: 点击按钮开始自动调焦

Feature.Name: OdFocusEnable
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 机械镜头快速调焦使能
Feature.Description::cn: 机械镜头快速调焦使能

Feature.Name: TuneStat
Feature.Description::en: Tune Status. 0 is working, other is finished.
Feature.Description::cn: 智能调参进度，100为已完成.

Feature.Description::cn: 读码自适应、普通码自适应、极小码自适应

Feature.Description::cn: 自适应调整模式，高速度模式或者高品质模式

Feature.Name: IDHSamGainMax

Feature.Name: FocusModeSelector
Feature.Description::en: Sets the config mode by users when choose to focus.

Feature.Name: FocusStep
Feature.Description::cn: 手动调焦时，电机每次转动设置的调焦步数

Feature.Name: FocusControl
Feature.Description::cn: 可对设备的调焦模式以及调焦的相关参数进行设置

Feature.Name: FocusMode
Feature.Description::cn: 点击按钮开始自动调焦

Feature.Name: FocusStep
Feature.Description::cn: 手动调焦时，电机每次转动设置的调焦步数

Feature.Name: AutoFocusStat
Feature.Description::en: Auto Focus Status. 0 is working, other is finished.
Feature.Description::cn: 自动调焦运行状态，0是正在工作，其他表示已完成.

Feature.Name: AutoConfig
Feature.Description::en: Sets the config mode by users when choose to focus.

EnumEntry.Name: FullAuto
EnumEntry.DisplayName::cn: 全自动调焦，调焦结束更改曝光时间、增益、补光灯等参数

EnumEntry.Name: MotorOnly
EnumEntry.DisplayName::cn: 只移动电机位置，所有环境参数都不改变

EnumEntry.Name: AutoRestore
EnumEntry.DisplayName::cn: 全自动调焦且调焦结束恢复原有的环境参数

Feature.Description::cn: 设置调焦区域的左上角顶点Y坐标

Feature.Description::cn: 调焦结束后输出当前调焦结果的评分

Feature.Name: SharpnessScore
Feature.Description::en: The sharpness of focus process when noread..

Feature.Name: FocusPositionParam
Feature.Description::en: the focus position of the focus postion array at index

Feature.Name: FocusPositionSave
Feature.Description::cn: 保存当前电机位置到FocusPosition对应的索引内

Feature.Name: LensCalibParamSet
Feature.Description::en: Tlens or Llens calibration param set

Feature.Name: FocusPositionLoad
Feature.Description::cn: 从电机当前位置转动到FocusPosition索引对应的位置上

Features.Description::cn: 可对设备的调焦模式以及调焦的相关参数进行设置

Feature.Description::cn: 可一键完成曝光、增益、伽马等参数的调整

Feature.Name: SelfAdaptParamAdjustMode
Feature.Description::cn: 自适应调整模式，高速度模式或者高品质模式

Feature.Description::cn: 调整完成时的参数存储位置，直接应用到当前参数或者设置到指定的轮询参数组

Feature.Name: SelfAdaptPollingParamIndex
Feature.Description::cn: 目标位置为轮询参数时的轮询组数索引

Feature.Description::cn: 高速度模式下的最大曝光值

Feature.Name: SelfAdaptGainMax
Feature.Description::en: Maximum gain allowed for adpative adjustment.
Feature.Description::cn: 高品质模式下的最大增益值

Feature.Name: SelfAdaptCodeTypeAdapt
Feature.Description::en: Enable code type adapt or not.
Feature.Description::cn: 条码类型自适应与否，开启时，会自动将条码类型设置成视野内识别到的所有条码类型，否则不对条码类型进行操作

Feature.Description::cn: 条码类型自适应与否，开启时，会自动将条码类型设置成视野内识别到的所有条码类型，否则不对条码类型进行操作

Feature.Name: SelfAdaptLightingMode
Feature.Description::cn: 光源自适应与否，开启时，会自动寻找适合当前场景的光源组合，否则不对光源进行任何操作

Features.Description::en: Auto adjust param until read succes

Feature.Description::cn: 相应的光源分路补光灯使能与否

Feature.Description::cn: 可进行 TCP客户端 停止触发、TCP服务端 停止触发、Udp 停止触发、IO停止触发、串口停止触发、超时停止触发及条码数停止触发设置

Feature.Name: TcpEndTriggerPort
Feature.Description::en: [TcpServerStopTriggerPort] the value is equal to the TCP Start Trigger Port
Feature.DisplayName::cn: TCP服务端停止触发的TCP端口号
Feature.Description::cn: TCP服务端停止触发的TCP端口号，相机做TCPserver

Feature.Name: TcpEndTriggerFormat
Feature.DisplayName::en: TCP Server End Trigger Text Format
Feature.DisplayName::cn: TCP服务端触发结束文本格式
Feature.Description::cn: TCP服务端触发结束文本格式

Feature.Description::en: [TcpDstStopTriggerAddr]the value is equal to the TCP start Trigger Addr

Feature.Description::cn: TCP客户端停止触发目标IP地址

Feature.Description::en: [TcpClientStopTriggerPort] the value is equal to the TCP Client Start Trigger Port
Feature.DisplayName::cn: TCP客户端停止触发的TCP端口号
Feature.Description::cn: TCP客户端停止触发的TCP端口号

Feature.Description::cn: TCP客户端停止触发文本格式

Feature.Name: TcpClientEndTriggerStr
Feature.Description::en: [TcpClientEndTriggerText] Tcp Client Stop Trigger Text, do not support complex Chinese font

Feature.Description::cn: TCP客户端停止触发命令字符串

Feature.Name: EncoderOutputMode
Feature.Description::en: This enumeration value selects the circumstances for the shaft encoder module to output trigger signals.
Feature.Description::cn: 此枚举值选择轴编码器模块输出触发信号的情况

Feature.Name: EncoderCounterMode
Feature.Description::en: Selects the counting mode of the tick counter of the shaft encoder module.
Feature.Description::cn: 选择轴编码器模块刻度计数器的计数模式

Feature.Name: EncoderCounterReset
Feature.Description::en: This command resets the tick counter count of the shaft encoder module to 0.
Feature.Description::cn: 此命令将轴编码器模块的刻度计数器计数重置为0

Feature.Name: EncoderMaxReverseCounter
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 编码器反向计数最大值
Feature.Description::cn: 编码器反向计数最大值

Feature.Name: SignalAlignment
Feature.Description::en: Selects the signal transition relationships between received and generated signals.
Feature.Description::cn: 选择接收信号和生成信号之间的信号转换关系

Feature.Name: PostDivider
Feature.Description::en: Sets the PostDivider value for the PostDivider sub-module.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置后分频器子模块的后分频器值

Feature.Description::en: [TcpServerEndTriggerText] Tcp Stop Trigger Text, do not support complex Chinese font

Feature.Name: StopTriggerActivation
Feature.Description::en: [StopTriggerActivation] Specifies the activation mode of the Stop trigger.
Feature.Description::cn: 选择本路IO停止触发方式，上升沿停止或者下降沿停止

Feature.Name: TimeOutEndTriggerEnable
Feature.Description::cn: 触发超时点后就停止触发开关

Feature.Name: TimeOutEndTriggerMax
Feature.Description::en: [MaximumOutputLimitedTime]After this time, the result must be output.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 超时触发的最大时间值(ms)
Feature.Description::cn: 超时触发的最大时间值，从触发开始到此时间长度后触发停止

Feature.Name: CodeNumEndTriggerEnable
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 读码个数停止触发开关
Feature.Description::cn: 触发内根据读码个数停止触发开关

Feature.Name: CodeNumEndTriggerMin
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 停止触发的最小码个数
Feature.Description::cn: 停止触发的最小码个数

Feature.Name: CodeNumEndTriggerMax
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 停止触发的最大码个数
Feature.Description::cn: 停止触发的最大码个数

Feature.Name: PollingStopTriggerEnable
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 轮询指定个数停止使能
Feature.Description::cn: 设置多组轮询指定条码个数使能

Feature.Name: PollingStopCondition
Feature.Description::en: select polling stop code number mode.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置多组轮询指定条码个数停止条件

EnumEntry.Name: WholePollingPeriod
EnumEntry.DisplayName::cn: 整个轮询周期内指定个数

Feature.Name: PollingStopCodeNum
Feature.Description::cn: 设置轮询所需要读到的最少条码个数

Features.Description::cn: 可进行 TCP 停止触发、Udp 停止触发、IO停止触发、串口停止触发、超时停止触发及条码数停止触发设置

Feature.Name: FilterMode
Feature.Description::en: Set the filter mode, normal mode or regular expression mode
Feature.Description::cn: 设置过滤模式为普通过滤模式或者正则表达式过滤模式

Feature.Name: WholeNumCodeEnable
Feature.Description::en: Whether to output bcr with only pure number.
Feature.Description::cn: 开启该功能则输出的条码信息为纯数字信息，非数字类信息会被过滤

Feature.Name: BarcodecharacterbeginsEnable
Feature.DisplayName::en: Begin with Specific Character for Result
Feature.Description::en: Only output bcr which character begins with setting one.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 以特定字符开始的数据
Feature.Description::cn: 开启该功能时，只输出起始位为特定字符的条码信息

Feature.Name: Barcodecharacterbegins
Feature.Description::en: Barcode character begins of the result.
Feature.Description::cn: 以特定字符起始的条码信息

Feature.Name: BarcodeContainStringEnable
Feature.Description::en: Only output bcr which character contains setting one.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 在条码中包含特定字符
Feature.Description::cn: 开启该功能时，只输出包含特定字符的条码信息

Feature.Name: BarcodeNoContainStringEnable
Feature.Description::en: Only output bcr which character not contain setting one.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 排除条形码中的特殊字符
Feature.Description::cn: 开启该功能时，只输出不包含特定字符的条码信息

Feature.Name: SortOnExpressSortSet
Feature.Description::cn: 在正则表达式参数组号中选择一个正则表达式名称

Feature.Name: MultiFrameIndex
Feature.Description::en: The frame index need to be OCR processing in specified mode.
Feature.Description::cn: 指定一帧图像进行OCR识别

Feature.Name: RegularExpressionRules
Feature.Description::cn: 在正则表达式筛选器参数中输入正则表达式内容，

Feature.Name: DuplicationEnable
Feature.Description::cn: 通过触发删除重复条码

Feature.Name: TimeOutEndTriggerMin
Feature.Description::en: [MinimumOutputTime] before this time point, all the results will not be output.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置需达到最小有效时间后，方能输出条码

Feature.Name: RegularCodeLenMax
Feature.Description::cn: 设置条码的最大截取长度

Feature.Name: RegularCodeOffset
Feature.Description::cn: 设置条码位数的偏移量

Feature.Name: FalseTriggerTimeFilterEnable
Feature.Description::cn: [触发时间过滤启用]触发最小时间过滤开关

Feature.Name: FalseTriggerImageMinTime
Feature.Description::cn: [触发最小时间]触发图像的最小值

Feature.Name: FalseTriggerResultOutputEnable
Feature.Description::en: [FalseTriggerResultOutputEnable] FalseTrigger Result is Output or not
Feature.Description::cn: [触发结果输出启用]触发结果是否输出

Feature.Name: CodeLengthUpperLimit
Feature.Description::en: Longest code lenth which filter pass
Feature.Description::cn: 过滤器通过的最大码长度

Feature.Name: CodeLengthLowerLimit
Feature.Description::en: Least code lenth which filter pass
Feature.Description::cn: 过滤器通过的最小码长度

Feature.Name: BarcodeCutMode
Feature.Description::en: Set the barcode Cut Mode, code offset mode or character expression mode
Feature.Description::cn: 条码裁剪模式分条码位数偏移量模式和字符表达式模式

Feature.Name: BarcodeSpecifiedRangeText
Feature.Description::cn: 字符表达式,例如:(1-9)表示截取第1至第9位字符

Feature.Name: FilterTime
Feature.Description::en: Time interval (ms) not recognize bcr if filter failed
Feature.Description::cn: 如果过滤失败，时间间隔(ms)不能识别bcr

Feature.Name: ReadTimesThreshold
Feature.Description::cn: 当同一个条码读取结果相同的次数超过该数值时，认为此为有效条码且输出结果；当低于该数值时，则认为此为无效条码且不输出结果

Feature.Name: RatingStandard_Enable
Feature.Description::en: set Rating Standard Enable or not.

Feature.Name: RatingStandard
Feature.Description::en: Rating Standard is available or not.

Features.Description::en: Category for bcr bar code filter control features

Feature.Name: ContrastControl
Feature.Description::cn: 可将读取到的数据与预设数据进行比对，并输出比对结果

Feature.Name: ContrastEnable
Feature.Description::cn: 使能数据比对功能与否

Feature.Name: ContrastAngle
Feature.Description::en: Contrast the bcr code angle or not
Feature.Description::cn: 比对条码条码角度与否

Feature.Name: ContrastRules
Feature.Description::en: Set the contrast rule, regular or consecutive number
Feature.Description::cn: 选择比对模式，常规比对模式或者连号比对模式

Feature.Name: RegularStartPosition
Feature.Description::en: The start position of regular comparison.
Feature.Description::cn: 常规比对模式比对起始位置

Feature.Name: CharNumber
Feature.Description::en: The number of characters to be contrasted.

Feature.Name: Wildcard
Feature.Description::en: Wildcard to match code content characters.
Feature.Description::cn: 用于比对的模式（Linux通配符）文本

Feature.Name: BaseValue
Feature.Description::en: The base value of consecutive number comparison.

Feature.Name: ConsStartPosition
Feature.Description::en: The start position of consecutive number comparison.
Feature.Description::cn: 连号比对模式比对起始位置

Feature.Name: DigitNumber
Feature.Description::en: The number of digit to be contrasted.

Feature.Name: Step
Feature.Description::cn: 连号比对的比对步进值

Features.Description::en: Category for bcr bar code contrast control features
Features.Description::cn: 可将读取到的数据与预设数据进行比对，并输出比对结果

Feature.Name: TransportLayerControl
Feature.Description::cn: 查看并设置数据通讯方式，数据输出的目的 IP、端口以及协议等

Feature.Name: CommunicationProtocols
Feature.Description::en: Controls the bcr result transfer protocol.

Feature.Name: FinsEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Fins protocol enable or not.

Feature.Name: FinsResultByteSwap
Feature.Description::cn: 数据结果传输过程大小端

Feature.Name: FinsResultTimeout
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 数据结果超时未发送时间(s)
Feature.Description::cn: 从PLC触发开始到超时间未给出结果会提供一个错误信号到PLC

Feature.Name: SmartSdkEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set smart sdk protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: EncodeJpgFlag
Feature.Description::en: Control whether bcr result contain jpg.

Feature.Name: TcpProtocolEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Tcp protocol enabled or not.
Feature.Description::cn: TCP输出协议开关，相机端做TCP client

Feature.Name: TCPReturnFromIoCtrl
Feature.Description::cn: 使用TCPclient触发链路输出信息

Feature.Name: BarcodeAsHeartbeat
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 条码数据也作为心跳信号
Feature.Description::cn: 条码数据也作为心跳信号开关

Feature.Name: GevMCPHostPortStandard
Feature.Description::en: Controls the port to which the device must send messages. Setting this value to 0 closes the message channel.

Feature.Name: GevMCDAStandard
Feature.Description::en: Controls the destination IP address for the message channel.

Feature.Name: GevMCPHostPort
Feature.Description::en: Controls the port to which the device must send messages. Setting this value to 0 closes the message channel.

Feature.Name: GevMCDA
Feature.Description::en: Controls the destination IP address for the message channel.

Feature.Name: SerialProtocolEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Serial protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: FtpProtocolEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Ftp protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: HttpServerEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Http server protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: HttpServerPort
Feature.Description::cn: 相机端作为服务的端口号

Feature.Name: TcpServerEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Tcp server protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: TcpReturnFromIoCtrl
Feature.Description::cn: 原路返回输出开关，在触发或者停止使用TCP情况下，可选数据原路返回

Feature.Name: TcpServerReturnFromIoCtrl
Feature.DisplayName::en: TCP Server Return From Io Ctrl
Feature.Description::cn: TCPServer原路返回输出开关，在触发或者停止使用TCP服务情况下，可选数据原路返回

Feature.Name: TcpserverFlexibleConnectEnable
Feature.Description::en: When the maximum number(8) of connections is reached, new connections are supported, and the earliest connections will be squeezed out.
Feature.Description::cn: 当达到最大连接数(8)时，将支持新的连接，并且最早的连接将被挤出。

Feature.Name: TcpServerBarcodeAsHeartbeat
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 条码数据也作为心跳信号
Feature.Description::cn: 条码数据也作为心跳信号

Feature.Name: MelsecEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Melsec Protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: MelsecServerIP
Feature.Description::en: IP address of the PLC to connect to.

Feature.Name: MelsecServerPort
Feature.Description::en: Port number of the PLC to connect to.

Feature.Name: MelsecNetworkNum
Feature.Description::cn: 和对端连接的网络编号

Feature.Name: MelsecControlPollInterval
Feature.Description::en: Requested time in milliseconds between successive polls of the Control Block from the PLC

Feature.Name: MelsecResultByteSwap
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 数据结果传输过程大小端
Feature.Description::cn: 数据结果传输过程大小端

Feature.Name: MelsecResultTimeout
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 数据结果超时未发送时间(s)
Feature.Description::cn: plc触发后，超时未有输出结果，反馈给对端一个错误信号

Feature.Name: ProfinetEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Profinet protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: ProfinetResultTimeout
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 数据结果超时未发送时间(s)
Feature.Description::cn: 超时未有输出结果，反馈给对端一个错误信号

Feature.Name: EthernetIpEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set EthernetIp protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: EthernetIpResultByteSwap
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 数据结果传输过程大小端
Feature.Description::cn: 数据结果传输过程大小端

Feature.Name: EthernetIpResultTimeout
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 数据结果超时未发送时间(s)
Feature.Description::cn: 超时未有输出结果，反馈给对端一个错误信号

Feature.Name: ModBusEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set ModBus protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: ModBusSlaveId
Feature.Description::en: Slave addresses only support 0 to 247 and 255

Feature.Name: ModBusResultByteSwap
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 数据结果传输过程大小端
Feature.Description::cn: 数据结果传输过程大小端

Feature.Name: ModBusResultTimeout
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 数据结果超时未发送时间(s)
Feature.Description::cn: plc触发后，超时未有输出结果，反馈给对端一个错误信号

Feature.Name: UdpProtocolEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set Udp protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: UsbEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set USB protocol enabled or not.

Feature.Name: UsbOutput
Feature.Description::en: Type of the Usb Output Mode.

Feature.Name: BleEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set BLE protocol enabled or not.
Feature.Description::cn: 蓝牙输出协议使能与否

Feature.Name: BleOutput
Feature.Description::en: Type of the Ble Output Mode.

Feature.Name: BleDataTransMode
Feature.Description::cn: 设置蓝牙数据传输模式

Feature.Name: GevCurrentIPAddress
Feature.Description::en: Current IP address for the given network interface.

Feature.Name: GevCurrentSubnetMask
Feature.Description::en: Current subnet mask of the given interface.

Feature.Name: GevCurrentDefaultGateway
Feature.Description::en: Indicates the default gateway IP address to be used on the given network interface.

Feature.Name: BillSortEnable

Feature.Name: BillInfoEnable
Feature.Description::en: Bill Info is enable or not.

Feature.Name: BillLocNum
Feature.Description::en: The maximum number of recognized objects in the scene.

Feature.Name: BillWidthFilterEnable

Feature.Name: BillHeightFilterEnable

Feature.Name: BillAngleFilterEnable
Feature.Description::en: Bill Angle Filter is enable or not.

Features.Description::en: Category that contains the transport layer control features

Feature.Name: MultiCameraControl
Feature.Description::cn: 进行多相机控制相关的配置

Feature.Name: GroupID
Feature.Description::en: Many cameras in the multicast group ID.

Feature.Name: GroupId
Feature.Description::en: Many cameras in the multicast group ID.

Feature.Name: MsWaitTime
Feature.Description::cn: 主站触发结束后等待时间(ms)

Feature.Name: MsTriggerCommandEnable
Feature.Description::en: main station triiger is send to sub station?
Feature.Description::cn: 主站触发后，是否将触发命令发送给从站？

Feature.Name: MsSubSdkEnable
Feature.Description::en: indicate main station send sub station code and black jpg data to sdk
Feature.Description::cn: 设置是否在主站idmvs上显示从站读码、图片数据.

Feature.Name: MsSyncROIEnable
Feature.Description::en: main station ROI sync to sub station?

Feature.Name: MainStationID
Feature.Description::en: Group ID also is Main Station ID
Feature.Description::cn: 主从组ID，同时也是主站的站ID

Feature.Name: QuerySubStationID
Feature.Description::en: Query the Sub Station By ID

Feature.Description::cn: 接收并解析用户发来的私有数据

Feature.Name: CustomTCPPort
Feature.Description::en: [CustomTCPPort] the value is equal to the TCP Start/End Trigger Port.

Feature.Name: CustomUDPPort
Feature.Description::en: [CustomUDPPort]the value is equal to the UDP Start/End Trigger Port.

Feature.Name: CustomProtocolHeadText
Feature.Description::en: [HeadText]User-defined protocol head for matching,"<Hex>" can be used to output any ASCII, '"<' ,'>' can't use them directly, they need to be replaced by "<3c>","<3e>"

Feature.Name: CustomProtocolTailText
Feature.Description::en: [HeadText]User-defined protocol Tail for matching,"<Hex>" can be used to output any ASCII, '"<' ,'>' can't use them directly, they need to be replaced by "<3c>","<3e>"

Feature.Name: CustomProtocolMsgLength
Feature.Description::en: User-defined protocol message length for matching.

Feature.Name: CustomProtocolDelimiter
Feature.Description::en: [OutAddCustomRecDelimiter] Custorm message add output Text's Delimiter, "<Hex>" can be used to output any ASCII.'"<' ,'>' can't use them directly, they need to be replaced by "<3c>","<3e>"

Feature.Name: CustomProtocolTriggerEnable
Feature.Description::en: [Custom Msg Trigger Enable]Trigger on Enable if receive message
Feature.Description::cn: 自定义协议触发使能与否

Feature.Name: CustomProtocolNoRecText
Feature.Description::en: [OutAddCustomRecDelimiter] No receive custorm messahe add Text, "<Hex>" can be used to output any ASCII.'"<' ,'>' can't use them directly, they need to be replaced by "<3c>","<3e>"

Feature.Name: OneByOneEnable
Feature.Description::en: Enable one by one mode or not.

Feature.Name: OneByOneInterval
Feature.Description::en: Set the interval time of one by one mode.
Feature.Description::cn: 设置逐条输出时间间隔(ms)

Feature.Name: ROILinkIOEnable
Feature.Description::en: Set ROI status link IO or not.

Feature.Name: OutPutResultBuffEnable
Feature.Description::en: [OutPutResultBuffEnable] Extended result output buffer enable, current just support SmartSDK TCP/IP Ftp

Feature.Name: NoReadSaveType
Feature.Description::en: No read select pic type to save.

Feature.Name: ROIOutputNoreadStrategy
Feature.Description::en: ROI output complement noread text or not.

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_Type
Feature.Description::cn: 无读时欲保存的图片格式

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_Count
Feature.Description::cn: 本地存图允许的最大数量，不同图片格式、不同设备型号可能都不同

Feature.Name: WithCodeButNoRead_Save
Feature.Description::cn: 有码无读存图: 视野中有条码,但是算法未识别

Feature.Name: ResSetEmmcISMODE
Feature.Description::en: set the Local save picture, no isn't save, otherwise save
Feature.Description::cn: 设置本地存图模式，无读时存图或者不存图

EnumEntry.Name: Emmc_IS_MODE_INSUFFICIENT_CODE
EnumEntry.DisplayName::cn: 未达最小读码数量存图模式

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_OW
Feature.Description::cn: 设置本地存图达到上限时的覆盖策略，不覆盖、循环覆盖等

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_OW_MaxCount
Feature.Description::en: Set Local Save Overrite Max Count
Feature.Description::cn: 覆盖策略为最大值模式和循环最大值模式时的覆盖阈值（图片的数量）

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_OW_Space
Feature.Description::en: Set Local Save Overrite Reserve Space
Feature.Description::cn: 覆盖策略为保留空间模式时需要保留的最小空间大小

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_FileName_SourceData
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 本地存图文件名称内容
Feature.Description::cn: 选择本地存图文件名称需要包含的内容

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_Picture_Name
Feature.Description::cn: 设置本地存图图片名称

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_Time_Format
Feature.Description::cn: 选择本地存图时间格式

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_Stra
Feature.Description::en: set the Local save picture strategy
Feature.Description::cn: 选择本地存图时的选图策略，包括最新帧、指定帧等策略

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_Range_Start_Index
Feature.Description::cn: 选图策略为指定范围帧时的起始帧索引

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_Range_End_Index
Feature.Description::cn: 选图策略为指定范围帧时的终止帧索引

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_IS_Index
Feature.Description::cn: 选图策略为特定帧时的帧索引

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_Space_Query
Feature.Description::cn: 查询已经使用的和未使用的存储空间的状态

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_Space_Total
Feature.Description::cn: 本地存图可以使用的总存储空间大小

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_Space_Avaliable
Feature.Description::cn: 本地存图目前能够使用的存储空间大小

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_Query
Feature.DisplayName::cn: 获取当前已存图片数量
Feature.Description::cn: 获取当前已存图片数量

Feature.Name: ResSet_Emmc_Query_Count
Feature.Description::cn: 当前本地已存图片数量

Feature.Name: ResSet_Output_IS_Stra
Feature.Description::en: set the Output save picture strategy
Feature.Description::cn: 输出选图策略，包括最新帧和特定帧两种策略

Feature.Name: ResSet_Output_IS_Index
Feature.Description::cn: 输出选图策略为Specific Frame时的帧索引

Feature.Name: EncodeFormat
Feature.Description::cn: 设置FTP文件名的编码格式，目前支持UTF-8和GB2312

Feature.Name: CodePosWidthEnable
Feature.Description::en: indinate the code position is need width at format
Feature.Description::cn: 指明码坐标是否需要按格式进行宽度补齐

Feature.Name: CodePosWidth
Feature.Description::en: indinate the code position with at the output format

Feature.Name: ROIOutputNoreadEnable
Feature.Description::en: ROI output complement noread text or not.
Feature.Description::cn: ROI无读补齐与否，若使能，则当一个ROI内未读到码时会补“TCP输出无读补齐文本”节点中的字符串

Feature.Name: OutputMirrorMarkTextEnable
Feature.Description::en: Output Mirror Mark text or not.
Feature.Description::cn: 使能镜像标记文本与否

Feature.Description::cn: 是否打开DM码的L边角度识别功能

Feature.Description::cn: 3号区域的结束值（即角度的上限值）

Feature.Description::cn: 4号区域的结束值（即角度的上限值）

Feature.Description::cn: 串口输出条码名称使能

Feature.Description::en: [SerialBarcodePositionEnable] Serial output contain barcode positon Enable.

Feature.Description::cn: 串口输出包含条码角度使能

Feature.Name: SerialOcrCenterPositonEnable
Feature.Description::en: [SerialOcrCenterPositonEnable] OCR Center Position Serial output Enable

Feature.Name: SerialOcrWidthHeigthEnable
Feature.Description::en: [SerialOcrWidthHeigthEnable] OCR Width Heigth Serial output Enable

Feature.Name: SerialOCRStartText
Feature.Description::en: [SerialOCRStartText] Ocr Start Text of the result

Feature.Name: SerialOCRStopText
Feature.Description::en: [SerialOCRStopText] Ocr Stop Text of the result

Feature.Name: SerialOCRDelimiterText
Feature.Description::en: [SerialOCRDelimiterText] Ocr Delimiter Text of the result

Feature.Name: OutputRetransEnable
Feature.Description::en: Ftp file Retransmission, when file transmit error.

Feature.Name: FtpCustomTriggerNumberEnable
Feature.DisplayName::en: Ftp Output Barcode Custom Trigger Number Enable
Feature.Description::en: [FtpCustomTriggerNumberEnable] Ftp output contain Custom Trigger Number Enable.
Feature.DisplayName::cn: FTP输出包含自定义触发号使能
Feature.Description::cn: FTP输出包含自定义触发号使能

Feature.Name: FtpTransmissionConditions
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输条件，读到码传输、未读到码传输或者总是传输

Feature.Name: FtpTransmissionResultType
Feature.Description::en: Sets the ftp transmission result contain.
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输内容，只传输条码相关内容、只传输图片或者都传输

EnumEntry.Name: ResultAndPicture
EnumEntry.DisplayName::cn: 条码相关内容和图片都传输

Feature.Name: ftpResultType
Feature.Description::cn: FTP上传文件类型,csv文件、xls文件、txt文件

Feature.Name: FTPFormatResultSetting
Feature.Description::en: Select data formatting content for FTP Upload file.

Feature.Name: FtpFormatResultString
Feature.Description::en: FTP Upload Directory Settings.',' as a column separator.
Feature.Description::cn: FTP结果文件内容设置.','作为每一列的分隔符

Feature.Name: FTPFormatDirectorySettings
Feature.Description::en: Select data formatting content for FTP Upload Directory.

Feature.Name: ResSet_Ftp_IS_Stra
Feature.Description::en: set the ftp noead save picture strategy
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输未读到条码时的选图策略，最新帧策略、所有帧策略、指定范围内的帧策略或者指定帧策略

Feature.Name: ResSet_Ftp_IS_Range_Start_Index
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输无读选图策略为指定范围内的帧时的帧起始索引

Feature.Name: ResSet_Ftp_IS_Range_End_Index
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输无读选图策略为指定范围内的帧时的帧终止索引

Feature.Name: ResSet_Ftp_IS_Index
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输无读选图策略为Specific Frame时的帧索引

Feature.Name: ResSet_Ftp_FileName_SourceData
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输中文件名的可选内容，包括帧号、条码内容、条码类型等

Feature.Name: ResSet_Ftp_Picture_Name
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输时图片在FTP服务器端对应的名称，该名称不包括文件的后缀，后缀会根据用户选择的图片格式而动态改变

Feature.Name: ResSet_Ftp_Result_Prefix
Feature.Description::en: Ftp_Result_Prefix, NO indicate not, RESULT indicate Read or Noread dir, All indicate All dir.
Feature.Description::cn: FTP传输时是否需要在服务端创建相应的目录，如果创建了目录，后续条码相关数据和图片都会存在该目录下面。No表示不需要，Result表示会根据读码与否创建read或者noread目录，All表示会创建all目录

EnumEntry.Name: ResSet_Ftp_Result_Prefix1
EnumEntry.DisplayName::cn: 根据读码结果创建目录

Feature.Name: UserSetSelector
Feature.Description::en: This enumeration selects the configuration set to load, save or configure. Possible values for the User Set Selector are: Default: Selects a configuration set that contains factory settings. User Set 1: Selects the first user set. When the Default configuration set is selected and loaded using User Set Load, the device must be in default factory settings state and must make sure the mandatory continuous acquisition use case works directly. Default User Set is read-only and cannot be modified.

Feature.Name: IddUserSetDefault
Feature.Description::en: This enumeration sets the configuration set to be used as the default startup set. The configuration set that has been selected as the default startup set will be loaded as the active set whenever the camera is powered on or reset.
Feature.Description::cn: 被选择为默认启动项的会在相机重新上电后加载相关配置项用户参数

Feature.Name: IDHUserSetSelector
Feature.Description::en: This enumeration selects the configuration set to load, save or configure. Possible values for the User Set Selector are: Default: Selects a configuration set that contains factory settings. User Set 1: Selects the first user set. When the Default configuration set is selected and loaded using User Set Load, the device must be in default factory settings state and must make sure the mandatory continuous acquisition use case works directly. Default User Set is read-only and cannot be modified.

Feature.Name: UserSetLoad
Feature.Description::en: This command loads the selected configuration set from the non-volatile memory in the camera to the volatile memory and makes the selected set the active configuration set. Once the selected set is loaded, the parameters in the selected set will control the camera.

Feature.Name: UserSetSave
Feature.Description::en: This command copies the parameters in the current active configuration set into the selected user set in the camera's non-volatile memory.

Feature.Name: UserSetDefault
Feature.Description::en: This enumeration sets the configuration set to be used as the default startup set. The configuration set that has been selected as the default startup set will be loaded as the active set whenever the camera is powered on or reset.

Feature.Name: IDHUserSetDefault
Feature.Description::en: This enumeration sets the configuration set to be used as the default startup set. The configuration set that has been selected as the default startup set will be loaded as the active set whenever the camera is powered on or reset.

Feature.Name: UserSetAdd
Feature.Description::en: This command copies the parameters in the current active configuration set into the selected user set in the camera's non-volatile memory.

Feature.Name: UserSetDelete
Feature.Description::en: Indicates the user set that is currently in use. At initialization time, the camera loads the most recently saved user set.

Features.Description::en: Category that contains the User Set control features
Features.Description::cn: 可保存或加载参数组，并设置设备上电启动时的默认参数组；还可以通过两个用户灯确认相关信息

Feature.Name: StatisticsInfo
Feature.Description::cn: 可统计设备自上电到当前或最近 10 次的总帧数、读到码帧数、未读到码帧数、读取率、算法耗时和读码耗时等数据

Feature.Name: StatisticsMode
Feature.Description::en: Select the statistic mode, making statistic based on data from booting up or recent 10 times.
Feature.Description::cn: 基于上电开始统计或者将最近的几帧进行统计

Feature.Name: StatFrameNumber
Feature.Description::en: Frame number the statistic based on.
Feature.Description::cn: 统计最近的几帧模式下，帧数配置

Feature.Name: ReadFrameNumber
Feature.Description::en: The actually number of frames got the code.

Feature.Name: NoreadFrameNumber
Feature.Description::en: The number of frames no got code.

Feature.Name: ReadRate
Feature.Description::en: The rate of read code successfully.

Features.Description::en: Category for presenting the statistic infomation
Features.Description::cn: 可统计设备自上电到当前或最近 10 次的总帧数、读到码帧数、未读到码帧数、读取率、算法耗时和读码耗时等数据

Feature.Name: ScreenLumi
Feature.Description::en: Set the brightness of the screen

Feature.Name: ScreenLanguage
Feature.Description::en: Set the language of the screen

Feature.Name: ScreenDirection
Feature.Description::en: Set the Direction of the screen

Feature.Name: DiagnoseEventReport
Feature.Description::cn: 在设备运行过程中，对崩溃异常、内存使用率和 CPU 使用率进行检测，并在出现崩溃、内存异常或 CPU 使用率过高时进行提示

Feature.Name: DiagnoER_EventCode
Feature.Description::cn: 每个事件对应唯一事件码

Feature.Name: DiagnoER_EventReportTime
Feature.Description::en: the Event report time is Event is detected, not occur time.may event is occurs earlier.
Feature.Description::cn: 事件报告时间，可能会稍晚于事件真正发生的时间

Feature.Name: DiagnoER_EventDetail
Feature.Description::en: display detail info of the event

Feature.Name: DiagnoER_ResetEvent
Feature.Description::cn: 清空现有的各种事件，重新开始统计

Features.Description::cn: 在设备运行过程中，对崩溃异常、内存使用率和 CPU 使用率进行检测，并在出现崩溃、内存异常或 CPU 使用率过高时进行提示
